PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Continued To Jul-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl and Ron Leeflang for William Lehnherr. Winnie Kwong for Wayne Lehnherr.

Ms. Lofdahl stated that the parties had reached a full settlement, that her client had signed the settlement, but that they were waiting for Wayne to sign it. Ms. Kwong stated that her client was getting the settlement notarized. Ms. Lofdahl requested the Court sign the settlement on behalf of Wayne. The Court continued the matter to July 2, 2008. Wayne Lehnherr is order to appear on that date. Sanctions will be imposed if he does not comply.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aguino.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar

Off Calendar May-21-2008 Continued To Jun-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar May-14-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Continued To May-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Feb-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. ANN O' DONNELL FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. NANCY LOFDAHL AND RONALD LEEFLANG FOR THE CONTESTANT WILLIAM LEHNHERR.

MS. LOFDAHL REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THE PARTIES ARE NOW IN MEDIATION. BOTH PARTIES HAVE CONDUCTED WRITTEN DISCOVERY. IF THE MEDIATION ON DECEMBER 17 IS NOT SUCCESSFUL IT WILL ASK THE COURT TO SET THE MATTER FOR TRIAL. THE COURT REFERRED THE MATTER TO DEPARTMENT 206 TO SET FOR TRIAL. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR STATUS OF THE MEDIATION ON FEBRUARY 6, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Continued To Dec-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl and Ronald Leeflang for William Lehnherr. Angela Schneider for Wayne Lehnherr.

Ms. Lofdahl reported that they attended mediation, that her discovery had been completed, and that the mediator had agreed to give them more time. The matter was continued to December 18, 2007 for further status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lee and Deputy Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Continued To Nov-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Continued To Sep-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Continued To Aug-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Lofdahl appearing for William Lehnherr. Michael Spalding appearing for petitioner Wayne Lehnherr. Mediation was not successful. Ms. Lofdahl wants to proceed with Will Contest. The need of a special administrator addressed. Mr. Spalding wanted the Court to appoint his client. Ms. Lofdahl objected. Court will appoint a professional fiduciary as Special Administrator. Parties will conduct discovery. Matter is continued to 8/1 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Ronald Leeflang and Nancy Lofdahl appearing for contestant. Michael Spalding appearing for petitioner. Counsel stipulated to mediation. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 4/4. Matter is continued to 4/11 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
